text:
Created attachment 237563
Gimp grash

This is how it happens:
1) Opening the GIMP
2) Creating the new pattern/template (default)
3) Clicking on the "Text Tool"
4) Selecting the area on the pattern/template
5) Typing in whatever text in the text box (any first letter)
5) Window "GIMP Crash Debug" pops up.
